LanguageData.VFET_Apparel_TribalHeavy.description: A full-body garment crafted using neolithic tools. While it may look primitive, it is very effective at insulating against cold temperatures. Provides slightly more protection than the standard tribalwear.
LanguageData.VFET_Apparel_TribalHeavy.label: heavy tribalwear
LanguageData.VFET_Apparel_TribalLight.description: A torso-only garment crafted using neolithic tools. While it may look primitive, it is very effective at insulating against heat temperatures.
LanguageData.VFET_Apparel_TribalLight.label: light tribalwear
LanguageData.VFET_Apparel_TribalWar.description: A full-body garment crafted using neolithic tools. While it may look primitive, it is very effective at insulating against cold temperatures. Provides slightly more protection than the standard tribalwear.
LanguageData.VFET_Apparel_TribalWar.label: war tribalwear
